creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=d238d5a277a6b68231b42bdd8bf90441a5189c07

commit d238d5a277a6b68231b42bdd8bf90441a5189c07
Author:     Milan Obuch <bsd@dino.sk>
AuthorDate: 2022-06-15 09:39:27 +0000
Commit:     Juraj Lutter <otis@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2022-06-15 09:40:55 +0000

    x11-wm/devilspie2: Add new port

    Add a new port, devilspie2, based on original devilspie, replacing its
    configuration file syntax with Lua based one, easier to maintain.

    devilspie2 port is based on original x11-wm/devilspie port, tuned to changed
    sources in the process.

    PR:             264378

 x11-wm/devilspie2/distinfo (new)             |  3 +++
 x11-wm/devilspie2/files/patch-Makefile (new) | 14 ++++++++++++
 x11-wm/devilspie2/pkg-descr (new)            | 14 ++++++++++++
 x11-wm/devilspie2/pkg-plist (new)            | 10 +++++++++
 6 files changed, 74 insertions(+)
